小升初英语复习题三十套（含详细解析）
（一）
一、语法巩固
1. What _____ useful dictionary it is!
A. a
B. an
C. the
D. /
2. Mr. Green has little time today, _____?
A. have he
B. hasn’t he
C. does he
D. doesn’t he
3. They will go to the Great Wall if it _____ tomorrow.
A. isn’t rain
B. rains
C. doesn’t rain
D. won’t rain
4. This box is _____ heavy for me _____ carry.
A. too … to …
B. to … too …
C. to … to …
D. too … too …
5. There _____ an English film tomorrow evening.
A. will have
B. will has
C. is going to have
D. is going to be
6. Hurry up, _____ we’ll miss the train.
A. but
B. or
C. and
D. so
答案及解析
1． A 解析：useful 以辅音音素开头，选 a。
2． C 解析：little 是否定意义，反意疑问句后半句用肯定 does。
3． C 解析：if 条件状语从句遵循主将从现。
4． A 解析：too ... to ... 表示太……而不能……
5． D 解析：there be 句型将来时。
6． B 解析：or 表示否则。
